targets.query:
from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cycle")
  |> group(columns: ["dataset", "unit"])
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["dataset"])
  |> count()

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "sensor_11")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "sensor_11" or r["_field"] == "sensor_4" or r["_field"] == "cycle")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: ["dataset", "unit"])
  |> last()
  |> sort(columns: ["dataset", "unit"])
